steps.title: Identify the role of the coefficient
steps.content: The formula converts kelvins to Fahrenheit. Substitute $h=557.33$ and isolate the fraction: $$557.33-32=\frac{9(v-273.15)}{5}.$$

steps.title: Interpret in context
steps.content: So $525.33=\frac{9(v-273.15)}{5}$, giving $v-273.15=\frac{5\cdot 525.33}{9}=291.85$ and $v=565$. The answer is 565.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $565$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $565$.
